reviews.review_description: Once the game loads it goes straight into it, when the timer is up the game is over for a very brief period, just long enough to see your score, then it begins again automatically. There’s no way of adding a player name or seeing a score board. It’s literally whack whack whack repeat. The environment is an eternal horizon, I think it could be made better by making you feel like you’re at a fair for example. Maybe have different levels so you progress to having 2 or even 3 rows where moles pop up from. Maybe even make it so you unlock different mallets.
Basic and very little instruction on how to play or even an indication of a leader board or top score. Downloads quickly but that’s about it.
